story.iWant: basic side panel HTML và React entry point
story.soThat: side panel UI can be developed

subtasks.subtask: Create `extension/src/sidepanel/sidepanel.html`
Add HTML structure với DOCTYPE, html, head, body

Add React root element: `
`
Add script tag automatically injected by webpack HtmlWebpackPlugin
Add basic CSS for side panel sizing (full height, 400-600px width)
Verify HTML structure is valid
Create `extension/src/sidepanel/sidepanel.tsx`
Import React và createRoot từ react-dom/client
Create root element reference: `document.getElementById('extension-root')`
Setup React root: `createRoot(rootElement)`
Render HelloExtension component vào root
Verify React setup works (build successful)
Create `extension/src/sidepanel/components/HelloExtension.tsx`
Create simple component: displays "Hello Extension" text
Import và render component trong sidepanel.tsx
Add basic styling (inline styles for now, Tailwind can be added later)
Verify component renders correctly (build successful)
Update manifest.json với `side_panel` permission và `side_panel.default_path`
Configure background worker to open side panel on action click
Use `chrome.sidePanel.setPanelBehavior({ openPanelOnActionClick: true })`
Build extension (using build config từ Story 10.3)
Load extension in Chrome Developer mode (build outputs ready for testing)
Click extension icon trong browser toolbar (requires manual verification by user)
Verify side panel opens (requires manual verification by user)
Verify side panel displays content (build outputs verified, requires manual verification by user)

task.title: Verify side panel sizing và persistence

subtasks.subtask: Add CSS để set side panel size: full height (100vh), width 400-600px (resizable)
Verify side panel displays at correct size (CSS configured)
Test với different content sizes (scrollable container configured)
Verify side panel is scrollable nếu content exceeds size (overflow-y: auto)
Verify side panel persists (doesn't close when clicking outside)
Test side panel sizing on different screen resolutions (CSS configured, requires manual verification by user)
Verify sidepanel.html structure is valid
Test React entry point renders without errors (build successful)
Verify Hello Extension component displays (component created and imported)
Test side panel opens khi clicking extension icon (build outputs ready, requires manual verification)
Verify side panel size is correct (full height, 400-600px width CSS configured)
Test side panel functionality (open, persistence, display) (build outputs ready, requires manual verification)
Verify background worker configured correctly

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Basic "Hello Extension" component renders in side panel
Side panel opens khi clicking extension icon (chrome.sidePanel API)
Side panel displays correctly (400-600px width, full height)
Background worker configured để open side panel on action click

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - ChainLens.so
doc.snippet: Side panel structure: `extension/src/sidepanel/sidepanel.tsx` (React entry point), `extension/src/sidepanel/sidepanel.html` (HTML template). Side panel size: Full height (100vh), width 400-600px (user resizable). Side panel persists (doesn't close when clicking outside).

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - ChainLens.so
doc.snippet: React 18+ for UI framework. Use ReactDOM.createRoot() (React 18 API). Tailwind CSS for styling. Side panel opens when clicking extension icon via chrome.sidePanel API.

doc.title: ChainLens.so Browser Extension - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want basic side panel HTML và React entry point, So that side panel UI can be developed. Acceptance criteria include sidepanel.html, sidepanel.tsx, basic component, side panel opens via chrome.sidePanel API, side panel sizing (full height, 400-600px width), và background worker configuration.

doc.title: Story 10.2: Extension Manifest Configuration
doc.snippet: Manifest configured với side panel: `side_panel.default_path: "sidepanel.html"`, `side_panel` permission. Background worker configured to open side panel on action click. Side panel opens khi clicking extension icon.

doc.title: Story 10.3: Build Configuration & Shared Code Setup
doc.snippet: Build configuration created với sidepanel entry point. Build produces `sidepanel.js` và `sidepanel.html` in `dist/` directory. Path aliases configured để import từ frontend.

file.reason: Manifest references sidepanel.html via `side_panel.default_path`. Side panel HTML must exist at path specified in manifest (typically `sidepanel.html` in dist/).
React entry point location. Create sidepanel.tsx here to render React app into sidepanel.html root element.

Side panel HTML template. Contains React root element `
`. Script tag automatically injected by webpack HtmlWebpackPlugin.
Background worker must configure chrome.sidePanel API: `chrome.sidePanel.setPanelBehavior({ openPanelOnActionClick: true })` to open side panel on action click.
Reference for React setup patterns. Extension side panel should follow similar React initialization pattern.

constraint.description: Must use React 18+ (matches frontend). Use ReactDOM.createRoot() API (React 18), not deprecated ReactDOM.render().
Side panel size: Full height (100vh), width 400-600px (user resizable). Can be set via CSS. Browser may enforce minimum/maximum sizes. Side panel persists (doesn't close when clicking outside).

Side panel HTML must have React root element: `
`. Element must exist before React tries to render. Script tag automatically injected by webpack HtmlWebpackPlugin.
Side panel HTML và JS processed by build tool (Story 10.3). Build output: `dist/sidepanel.html` và `dist/sidepanel.js`. Manifest references `sidepanel.html` via `side_panel.default_path`.
Use Tailwind CSS (matches frontend). Side panel-specific styles can be added. Ensure styles don't conflict với browser default styles.

Background worker must configure chrome.sidePanel API: `chrome.sidePanel.setPanelBehavior({ openPanelOnActionClick: true })`. Side panel opens when clicking extension icon. Side panel persists (doesn't close when clicking outside).
Manifest `side_panel.default_path` references `sidepanel.html`. Build output must match this reference. `side_panel` permission required.

interface.name: Side Panel HTML Template
interface.signature: với script tag automatically injected by webpack

tests.standards: Testing standards: Verify sidepanel.html structure is valid, test React entry point renders without errors, verify Hello Extension component displays, test side panel opens khi clicking extension icon, verify side panel size is correct (full height, 400-600px width), test side panel functionality (open, persistence, display), verify background worker configured correctly. Use Chrome extension management và DevTools để verify.

test.idea: Verify sidepanel.html structure is valid HTML và contains React root element
Verify sidepanel.html script tag automatically injected by webpack HtmlWebpackPlugin
Test React entry point (sidepanel.tsx) renders without errors (check DevTools Console)
Verify React root element is found và React renders successfully
Verify Hello Extension component displays "Hello Extension" text trong side panel
Check component renders correctly với basic styling
Verify background worker configured với chrome.sidePanel.setPanelBehavior()
Click extension icon trong browser toolbar và verify side panel opens
Verify side panel displays content (Hello Extension component)
Measure side panel size và verify it's full height (100vh) và width 400-600px (resizable)
Test side panel với content that exceeds size và verify scrolling works
Test side panel sizing on different screen resolutions
Verify side panel persists (doesn't close when clicking outside)
Verify background worker configured correctly trong background.ts
